title: olearia heterocarpa
intro: Olearia heterocarpa, also known as the prickly bush fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia heterocarpa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
